subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Thy petition hath attained unto the Most Holy Court, and its beginning hath been adorned with the crown of the mention of the Lord of Names [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله عریضه ات بساحت اقدس فائز و راس آن باکلیل ذکر مالک اسماء مزین
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of dreams and visions, @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude
